name: Rosemary Potato Wedges with Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Red Salsa: Toss all ingredients in a bowl. Taste and adjust seasonings. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
2. Potatoes:
a. Scrub the potatoes.
b. Partially cook them in lightly salted water on medium heat until almost fork tender. Drain.
c. When the potatoes are cool enough to handle, cut into quarters lengthwise.
d. Spray the potato wedges with olive-oil-flavored non-stick cooking spray.
e. Mix the rosemary and chili powder together.
f. Rub the seasonings on the potato wedges.
g. Place the grill rack over ashen-hot coals and spray it with non-stick cooking spray.
h. Grill the potato wedges, turning as necessary, until they are crusty and cooked through.
3. Serve the grilled potato wedges on individual plates with salsa passed alongside.
